specific_question: Had Elexion Automotive finalized its renewable-material asset utilization plan under its Asset Lifecycle Manager's direction by October 1, 2025?
answer: Yes. According to Elexion Automotive's sustainability and material utilization memo, the plan to guide the reuse of recycled metal and polymers across its facilities was finalized on September 20, 2025.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
